mech: High-quality lean protein with EPA/DHA omega-3. Supports insulin sensitivity and lipid markers within a calorie deficit
ev: PREDIMED cohort: oily-fish intake associated with lower waist (−0.97 cm in meta-analysis)
prep: Bones for calcium. Lemon for iron absorption.

mech: Complete protein with choline (supports hepatic lipid metabolism). Highly satiating per calorie
ev: MESA cohort: higher dietary choline associated with lower visceral fat
prep: Soft-boil to preserve choline.

mech: High-protein, high-omega-3. Mechanistically supports anti-inflammatory pathways; clinical effect is modest within calorie deficit
ev: RCTs: fish-oil supplementation associated with small reductions in trunk fat
prep: Bake 180°C skin-on.

mech: Slow-release casein protein for satiety and overnight MPS. Live cultures may support gut function
ev: RCT: high-dairy diets within a calorie deficit modestly improved fat-loss outcomes (Zemel 2005)
prep: Evening meal. Live cultures.

mech: High leucine for mTOR/MPS during deficit
ev: ~2.8g leucine per serving
prep: Braise or slow-cook.

mech: Among the highest omega-3 content of common fish (~2.6g/100g). High-quality lean protein
ev: Cohort and RCT evidence aligned with sardines and salmon for cardiometabolic markers
prep: Tinned or grilled. Swap with sardines.

mech: Highest protein:calorie ratio. Tryptophan for serotonin
ev: Most efficient protein per calorie
prep: Roast or stir-fry.

mech: Casein sustained MPS overnight. Lower fat option
ev: Casein MPS well-established
prep: Evening. Add chia + cinnamon.

mech: 30+ probiotic strains. Bioavailable calcium
ev: Meta: fermented dairy reduces metabolic syndrome
prep: Unsweetened. Evening.

mech: Fermented soy isoflavones. Complete protein
ev: Meta: soy reduced waist in postmenopausal women
prep: Pan-fry with garlic + ginger.

mech: Glycine + glutamine: gut barrier repair
ev: Glycine-gut barrier pathway supported
prep: Simmer 12–24 hr. Use as soup base.

mech: Sulforaphane activates the Nrf2 antioxidant pathway. Anti-inflammatory effect supports insulin sensitivity
ev: RCTs: reduced fasting glucose and HbA1c with broccoli sprout extract
prep: Chop + rest 40min. Steam 4min.

mech: High volume, low calorie, with iron and magnesium. Thylakoid extract has appetite-suppressing effects in trials; whole spinach effect is more modest
ev: Thylakoid RCTs: hunger reduced and weight loss enhanced. Whole spinach intake associated with lower CMD risk in cohorts
prep: Raw for thylakoids; cooked for higher iron bioavailability.

mech: Resistant starch (when cooled) feeds SCFA-producing gut bacteria. Low GI when paired with protein
ev: DIRECT PLUS RCT: a Mediterranean dietary pattern high in legumes + polyphenols reduced visceral fat. Lentils contributed; not tested in isolation
prep: Cook then cool. Wed+Sat carb days.

mech: Cruciferous family — provides indole-3-carbinol and fibre. Supports oestrogen metabolism
ev: Cohort evidence: cruciferous intake inversely associated with central adiposity
prep: Ferment or raw slaw.

mech: Glucomannan gel reduces glucose/insulin
ev: Meta: 3g/d reduced weight 0.79kg
prep: Rinse. Dry-fry 2 min.

mech: Soluble fibre forms a satiating gel. Plant omega-3 (ALA). Modest effect when added to a calorie-controlled diet
ev: Small RCTs: reduced waist and inflammatory markers when used as a fibre supplement
prep: Soak 15 min.

mech: Highest glucosinolate content among brassicas. Anti-inflammatory and supports detoxification pathways
ev: Composition data confirmed. Cohort evidence aligns with broader cruciferous benefit
prep: Halve + roast. Rest 10 min post-cut.

mech: I3C + sulforaphane. Rice substitute
ev: 37 vs 200 kcal per rice serving
prep: Rice it for carb substitute.

mech: Lignans (SDG) plus ALA omega-3 plus soluble fibre. Supports oestrogen modulation and lipid markers
ev: Meta-analysis: 30g+/day reduced weight, BMI, and waist circumference
prep: Must be ground. Add to yoghurt.

mech: Inulin prebiotic. Chromium insulin sensitivity
ev: Prebiotic effect confirmed
prep: Roast or steam.

mech: Beta-glucan gel. Avenanthramides anti-inflammatory
ev: Meta: 3g/d reduces LDL 5–10%, glucose
prep: Steel-cut. Carb days only. Cook then cool.

mech: RS when cooled. GI 44 boiled+cooled vs 94 baked
ev: RS mechanism applies when cooled
prep: Boil then cool. Carb days. Never bake.

mech: Catechins (EGCG) plus modest caffeine. Small effect on energy expenditure and fat oxidation; useful as a low-calorie hydration anchor
ev: Meta-analysis of catechin trials showed a small reduction in visceral fat (~5.6 cm²) over 12 weeks
prep: 80°C, 3 min steep. Drink 1 hr away from iron-rich meals.

mech: Allicin and related sulphur compounds support lipid and BP markers. Effect on body composition modest
ev: Meta-analysis: reduced weight ~0.75 kg, waist ~2.1 cm in trials >8 weeks
prep: Crush + rest 10 min before cooking.

mech: Capsaicin has a small acute thermogenic effect; main practical value is appetite suppression and meal satisfaction
ev: Meta-analysis: ~50 kcal/d expenditure boost (small, may habituate)
prep: Daily with fat.

mech: Acetic acid blunts post-meal glucose response. Some evidence for modest waist reduction; magnitude is small
ev: Kondo 2009 RCT (n=175, Japanese cohort): waist −1.4 cm and small VAT reduction over 12 weeks
prep: Always dilute in 250ml+ water. Use a straw. 15 min pre-meal. Skip if reflux/PUD.

mech: Cinnamaldehyde AMPK + IRS-1
ev: Meta: reduced fasting glucose and HOMA-IR
prep: Ceylon only (not cassia).

mech: Curcumin shows anti-inflammatory effects in trials. Whole-spice doses are modest; high-dose extracts carry hepatotoxicity case reports
ev: Meta-analysis: small reductions in BMI and waist with curcumin supplementation
prep: Always with black pepper + fat. Whole spice form is generally safer than concentrated extracts.

mech: Flavanols improve insulin sensitivity
ev: RCT: reduced fasting glucose and insulin
prep: 85%+ only. 20g max. Carb-day treat.

mech: MUFA-rich with polyphenols (oleocanthal, hydroxytyrosol) that show anti-inflammatory effects. Cornerstone of Mediterranean dietary pattern
ev: PREDIMED RCT: Mediterranean diet with EVOO reduced cardiovascular events and visceral fat
prep: Post-cooking or cook below 180°C.

mech: MUFA, soluble fibre, and potassium. Replaces refined fats in the diet
ev: RCT (Habitual Diet and Avocado Trial): modest improvement in central adiposity within calorie balance
prep: Half at lunch.

mech: Hepatic ketogenesis without full keto
ev: RCT: reduced trunk fat vs LCT
prep: Morning tea. Build slowly.

mech: Plant omega-3 (ALA), polyphenols, magnesium. Replaces refined snack foods
ev: PREDIMED cohort: nut consumption inversely associated with central adiposity
prep: Raw. 30g max — calorie dense.

mech: MUFA, prebiotic fibre, magnesium. Modest absorbed-calorie reduction vs label
ev: Multiple RCTs: small reductions in waist and visceral fat when replacing refined snacks
prep: Raw, skin-on. 23g measured.

mech: EVOO-family polyphenols (oleocanthal, hydroxytyrosol) plus fibre. Acts as a satisfying snack alternative
ev: PREDIMED cohort: olive intake inversely associated with metabolic syndrome
prep: Kalamata or green. 8–10 max.

mech: Complete plant protein with optimal omega-6 to omega-3 ratio. GLA content supports anti-inflammatory pathways
ev: Composition well-characterised; clinical outcome trials limited
prep: Sprinkle on salads. Don't heat.

mech: Ultra-low energy density. Adds satisfying meal volume without calories
ev: Volumetrics studies: high-water-content foods reduce total intake by 12–20% within meals
prep: Raw with meals.

mech: Eritadenine + beta-glucans
ev: RCT: improved lipids, reduced CRP
prep: Dry-fry or roast.

mech: Antioxidant phytochemicals; small trials suggest modest glucose-lowering effect
ev: Small RCTs: improved fasting glucose and insulin sensitivity
prep: 60°C max in tea (preserves phytochemicals).

mech: Viscous gel + bile acid sequestration
ev: Meta: reduced LDL 7%
prep: 300ml water each dose. 2×/day.

mech: Beta-carotene RAR adipocyte differentiation
ev: Higher beta-carotene = lower VAT
prep: Cook lightly + EVOO.

mech: Lycopene (a fat-soluble carotenoid) supports anti-inflammatory and lipid markers
ev: Cohort evidence: higher dietary lycopene associated with lower waist circumference
prep: Cook with EVOO. Paste > raw (lycopene more bioavailable cooked).

mech: L. plantarum probiotic for microbiome
ev: Fermented veg improves metabolic markers
prep: Raw/unpasteurised. 2–3 tbsp.

mech: Dietary nitrates raise NO and improve endothelial function. Supports BP and exercise economy
ev: RCTs: beetroot juice modestly reduces BP and improves exercise tolerance
prep: Raw grated or juiced. Watch carb count if juicing.

mech: Apigenin anti-inflammatory. Ultra-low density
ev: Volumetrics utility
prep: Raw. Pressure valve food.

mech: Punicalagin urolithin A mitophagy
ev: Reduced inflammation markers in RCT
prep: Seeds only. Juice too caloric.

mech: Naringenin AMPK + hepatic FA oxidation
ev: RCT: reduced weight 1.6 kg over 12 wk
prep: Check drug interactions (CYP3A4).

mech: Iodine thyroid + fucoxanthin UCP1
ev: Fucoxanthin RCTs: modest weight loss
prep: Add to soups. Check iodine.

mech: Vitamin C 127mg for carnitine synthesis
ev: Vitamin C-carnitine pathway A-grade
prep: Raw for max C. Red > green.

mech: Hericenones NGF + erinacines reduce cortisol
ev: RCTs for cognitive/mood
prep: Saute in EVOO.

mech: Soluble fibre / mucilage slows gastric emptying and supports satiety. Animal data suggests effects on adipocyte signalling; human evidence is preliminary
ev: Small RCTs (Ngondi 2009, n=102) and meta of 5 small trials: modest reductions in weight and waist
prep: Ground in soup. Dishes: Ogbono soup

mech: Hibiscus anthocyanins support modest BP and lipid improvements. Useful as a low-calorie hydration anchor that replaces sugary drinks
ev: Chang 2014 RCT: small reductions in BMI and body fat over 12 weeks
prep: No sugar EVER. Ginger + clove. Dishes: Zobo, Sobolo, Bissap

mech: Vernodalin and related compounds inhibit α-glucosidase in vitro and stimulate muscle glucose uptake in animal models. Human clinical evidence not yet established
ev: Animal and in-vitro studies only
prep: Squeeze-wash, don't over-boil. Dishes: Ofe onugbu, Ndole

mech: Guineensine TRPV1 + nutrient bioavailability enhancement
ev: TRPV1 confirmed. Piperine family extrapolated
prep: End of cooking. Dishes: Pepper soup, Nsala

mech: Gingerols AMPK + thermogenesis + NF-κB suppression
ev: Meta-analysis: reduced weight 0.85 kg, WHR, fasting glucose
prep: Fresh > dried. Grate into everything. Dishes: Ginger zobo, Pepper soup

mech: Kolaviron hepatoprotective + anti-inflammatory
ev: Animal studies only
prep: 1 after meals. Max 2–3/day. Dishes: Raw digestive

mech: Paradol (same family as grains of paradise) shows small acute effects on energy expenditure. Practical magnitude is small
ev: Sugita 2014 RCT on grains of paradise (relative): modest increase in cold-induced thermogenesis
prep: Chew 3–5 seeds post-meal. Dishes: Pepper soup

mech: Spice blend (groundnut + ginger + cayenne + clove + uziza) adds flavour intensity that supports satiety and adherence on lean proteins
ev: Individual components have RCT evidence. Combined effect is inferred, not directly tested
prep: Rub on grilled proteins. Dishes: Suya, Kilishi, Tsire

mech: Flavanols support endothelial function (NO production) and modest improvements in insulin sensitivity
ev: RCTs: cocoa flavanols improved insulin sensitivity and BP at 200–500mg/day
prep: Raw, unsweetened powder in zobo or nono. Dishes: Cocoa zobo

mech: High in resistant starch when unripe and cooked-then-cooled. Feeds SCFA-producing gut bacteria. Low GI (~40 unripe vs 70+ ripe)
ev: Composition: 15–20g RS/100g unripe. Resistant starch RCTs support gut and metabolic markers
prep: GREEN only. Boil/roast, cool 30 min+. Dishes: Boiled plantain, Boli

mech: Mucilage gel reduces glucose absorption. Isoquercitrin α-glucosidase
ev: Saatchi 2023 RCT: improved fasting glucose in T2DM
prep: Keep mucilage. Dishes: Okra soup, Bamia

mech: 50% fibre + polyphenols. Vitamin C 6× oranges
ev: Coe 2013 RCT: reduced glycaemic response 20–25%
prep: In water, zobo, yoghurt. Dishes: Bouye

mech: 70%+ oleic acid (=EVOO) + RS + prebiotic
ev: Lipid improvement in human studies
prep: Soak overnight. 30g max. Dishes: Kunun aya

mech: Low GI grain + methionine/cysteine for glutathione
ev: Lower GI than rice. Unique amino acid profile
prep: Cook, cool for RS. Carb days. Dishes: Fonio couscous

mech: RS when cooled. GI 33–42. Folate dense
ev: DIRECT PLUS legume evidence applies
prep: Soak, cook, cool. Dishes: Moin-moin, Akara, Ewa agoyin

mech: GI 54–68 (lower than rice). Mg 114mg/100g
ev: Anitha 2021 meta: reduced HbA1c vs refined grains
prep: Cook then cool. Carb days. Dishes: Fura da nono, Tuwo

mech: RS when cooled. GI 54. High fibre for a tuber
ev: GI 54 lower than most tubers
prep: Boil then cool. Carb days. Dishes: Cocoyam porridge, Ekpang nkukwo

mech: Concentrated protein + preserved omega-3. Leucine 3g/serving
ev: 80–90% omega-3 retained. 60–80% protein by weight
prep: Soak overnight. Dishes: Ogbono/bitter leaf soup

mech: Astaxanthin NF-κB suppression. Zinc + selenium
ev: Zn 3.5mg, Se 20μg per 15g
prep: Ground in every soup. Dishes: Universal soup base

mech: Plant protein with zinc and MUFA. Traditional staple; portion-sensitive at 155 kcal/30g
ev: Composition data: 30–35% protein, ~7mg zinc/100g. No direct human RCT for waist outcomes
prep: 30g max. Calorie dense. Dishes: Egusi soup

mech: MUFA-rich nut with traditional satiety value. Animal-model evidence for adipocyte signalling
ev: Umoru 2024 animal study: changes in adiponectin/PPARγ pathways. Human evidence not yet established
prep: Must be boiled. 30g max. Dishes: Boiled as snack

mech: Ultra-lean protein. Selenium. Most affordable African fish
ev: 26g protein at 128 kcal
prep: Grill or bake. Pepper soup. Dishes: Grilled tilapia, Pepper soup

mech: Leaner than chicken (5g vs 10g fat). Higher iron
ev: Lower fat, higher iron. Traditional free-range
prep: Slow-cook or pepper soup. Dishes: Guinea fowl pepper soup

mech: High protein:calorie. Omega-3 (freshwater)
ev: 28g protein / 170 kcal
prep: Grill. Pepper soup. Dishes: Catfish pepper soup, Point and kill

mech: Ultra-lean (16g protein, 1.5g fat). Iron 3.5mg/100g
ev: 90 kcal for 16g protein
prep: Clean thoroughly. Boil or pepper soup. Dishes: Peppered snail

mech: Ultra-lean shellfish. Highest iron content in the protein library (7mg/100g). Useful for iron-deficient women
ev: Composition data: 15g protein at 80 kcal, 7mg iron
prep: Boil in shell, pick out. Dishes: Edikang ikong, Periwinkle soup

mech: Zinc 10mg/100g (highest seed in protocol). Phytosterols
ev: Zinc highest among seeds. Phytosterol confirmed
prep: Roast lightly. 30g max. Dishes: Roasted snack, Ground in soups

mech: Mucilage gel (glucomannan-like) + chlorogenic acid AMPK
ev: 28 kcal/100g. Mucilage confirmed
prep: Cook 2–3 min. Keep mucilage. Dishes: Ewedu soup, With gbegiri

mech: Highest protein leaf (4g/100g). Iron + flavonoids
ev: 21 kcal, 4g protein, 5mg iron/100g
prep: 2 min in soup. Dishes: Edikang ikong, In egusi

mech: 16 kcal/100g (lower than cucumber). High ALA for a leaf
ev: 92% water. Unusually high ALA
prep: Generously in soups. Dishes: Edikang ikong

mech: Nasunin anthocyanin antioxidant. Saponins reduce cholesterol
ev: 25 kcal/100g. Nasunin confirmed
prep: Raw with groundnut or in stews. Dishes: Garden egg sauce

mech: Distinct from zobo flower. High vitamin C + iron. Mucilage
ev: Different from zobo flower. Vit C + iron synergy
prep: Cook in soups (reduce oxalic acid). Dishes: Sorrel soup, With beans

mech: Bacillus subtilis probiotic + bioactive peptides for SCFA production
ev: B. subtilis confirmed. Bioactive peptides present
prep: Replace stock cubes. Dishes: In every soup/stew

mech: Fermented maize porridge with Lactobacillus plantarum. Fermentation reduces phytate; however, glycaemic index remains high (70–80)
ev: Microbiology data confirmed. Use carb-day only and pair with protein to blunt glucose spike
prep: Carb days only. Thin. Pair with protein. Dishes: Ogi with moin-moin

mech: CLA + casein + Lactobacillus = identical to Greek yoghurt mechanism
ev: Zemel 2005 RCT: 66% greater VAT loss with dairy
prep: Unsweetened. Swap for yoghurt. Dishes: Fura da nono

mech: Unrefined red palm oil contains tocotrienols, beta-carotene, and CoQ10 — distinct from refined palm oil. Use as a flavourful traditional fat, not as a primary fat source
ev: Tocotrienol content well-characterised. Cardiometabolic effects in small trials are mixed; saturated-fat content still counts toward daily total
prep: 1 tbsp max. Unrefined RED only — never the refined commodity oil. Dishes: In efo riro, Banga soup

mech: Complete protein (rare legume). RS when cooled
ev: 24% protein. All essential amino acids
prep: Soak, boil. Cook then cool. Dishes: Boiled, In porridge

mech: Triterpenes anti-inflammatory. Stearic acid neutral LDL effect
ev: Stearic acid uniquely neutral among SFAs
prep: Small amounts. Traditional Sahel cooking fat. Dishes: In Tuo Zaafi

mech: Highest omega-3 per gram of small fish. Low mercury, high B12 and selenium
ev: ~2g EPA+DHA per 50g. PREDIMED-aligned VAT pathway
prep: Tinned in EVOO. Chop into salads, eggs, or stews.

mech: Highest casein-to-calorie ratio of any common dairy. Bioavailable calcium and slow-release protein
ev: Casein RCTs: sustained MPS and satiety. Higher protein density than Greek yoghurt
prep: Plain, unsweetened. Top with chia + cinnamon + berries.

mech: Complete plant protein with isoflavones. Particularly relevant in postmenopausal women for body composition and bone
ev: Meta-analysis: soy intake associated with lower waist in postmenopausal cohorts
prep: Steam from frozen 4 min. Sea salt. Pre-meal volume.

mech: Fastest absorbing leucine spike. mTOR/MPS preservation in deficit
ev: Meta: whey reduced fat mass vs casein in caloric deficit
prep: Post-workout or to fill leucine gap at any meal.

mech: B12 + omega-3 + zinc + iron in one of leanest seafoods
ev: Highest B12 of any food. Sustainable, low-impact protein
prep: Steam in white wine, garlic, parsley.

mech: Casein protein:cal ratio second only to skyr
ev: Casein MPS established. Slow-release amino acids
prep: Plain. Evening dessert with berries or cocoa.

mech: Sulforaphane Nrf2 + lutein/zeaxanthin + Vitamin K1
ev: #2 ANDI score. Same Nrf2 pathway as broccoli
prep: Massage with EVOO 5 min, or wilt 2 min in stir-fry.

mech: Cynarin bile flow + inulin prebiotic FOS for SCFA
ev: RCT: cynarin extract reduced LDL and improved liver enzymes
prep: Steam 30 min. Dip leaves in EVOO + lemon.

mech: RS when cooled. GI 28. Soluble fibre upregulates GLP-1
ev: Meta: chickpea intake reduced LDL and increased satiety
prep: Cook + cool. Roast for snack. Carb days only.

mech: Anthocyanin (skin) + RS3 (cooled) double mechanism. GI 30
ev: Multiple RCTs: improved insulin sensitivity and lipids
prep: Cook + cool. Carb days. Pair with brown rice for completeness.

mech: Complete protein grain. GI 53. Quercetin + ecdysteroids
ev: Limited RCTs but unique amino acid + low GI profile
prep: Rinse (saponins) + cook then cool. Carb days.

mech: Anthocyanins AMPK + endothelial NO + anti-inflammatory
ev: RCT: 1 cup/day improved insulin sensitivity in obese
prep: Frozen wild = highest anthocyanin density per £.

mech: Pectin viscous fibre + quercetin in skin
ev: Cohort: apple intake inversely associated with VAT
prep: Skin-on. Pre-meal for satiety (water-volume effect).

mech: Highest beta-glucan grain. GI 25 (lower than oats)
ev: Meta: 3g/d beta-glucan reduces LDL + post-meal glucose
prep: Cook + cool. Carb days only.

mech: Caffeine lipolysis + chlorogenic acid hepatic glucose suppression
ev: Meta: coffee intake reduced T2D risk and total body fat
prep: Black or with cinnamon. Avoid with iron-rich meals.

mech: Piperine TRPV1 + boosts curcumin bioavailability 20×
ev: RCT: piperine + curcumin synergy well-established
prep: Always pair with turmeric. Daily on protein.

mech: Allyl isothiocyanate has small acute thermogenic effects in animal models. Practical magnitude in humans is uncertain. Mainly a flavour-and-satiety boost
ev: Animal model thermogenesis. Human RCTs limited
prep: Whole-grain mustard or English-style. Rub on protein.

mech: Eugenol AMPK + α-glucosidase + α-amylase inhibition
ev: Strong in-vitro α-glucosidase. Limited human RCTs
prep: Ground in zobo, coffee, stews.

mech: Mg 168mg + zinc 2.2mg per 30g. Insulin receptor co-factors
ev: Mg-VAT inverse association in cohort + RCT evidence
prep: Raw or lightly toasted. 30g (one small handful) max.

mech: Selenium ~96μg/nut for thyroid T4→T3 + glutathione peroxidase
ev: RCT: 2/day raised selenium and reduced oxidative stress
prep: STRICT 2 nuts/day max. Toxicity above 400μg selenium.

mech: MUFA + carotenoids + ~5% lower kcal-absorbed than label
ev: RCTs: most consistent nut for waist circumference reduction
prep: In-shell slows eating rate. 30g (~49 nuts).

mech: Highest MUFA % of any nut (78%). Palmitoleic acid for adiponectin
ev: Lipid improvement in human RCTs
prep: Raw. 5 nuts max — calorie dense.

mech: Sesamin + sesamolin lignans for hepatic lipid metabolism. Ca 64mg/tbsp
ev: RCT: sesame lignans improved lipid profile
prep: Drizzle on greens with lemon + garlic. Or in dressings.

mech: Pelargonidin anthocyanin + ellagic acid AMPK
ev: RCT: 320g/d improved insulin sensitivity + lipid profile
prep: Frozen also fine. Pair with Greek yoghurt or skyr.

mech: 95% water + lutein. Replaces pasta volume
ev: Volumetrics evidence: reduces calorie density
prep: Spiralize for noodles. Roast in EVOO + garlic.

mech: L. plantarum probiotic + capsaicin TRPV1 dual mechanism
ev: RCT: kimchi reduced VAT and improved insulin sensitivity
prep: Side dish at every meal. Unpasteurised, refrigerated.

mech: Highest ANDI nutrient density score (#1) + glucosinolates
ev: Highest known nutrient:calorie ratio of any food
prep: Raw in salads. Wilt into eggs at the end.

mech: Inulin prebiotic — highest food source. Bitters stimulate bile
ev: Inulin prebiotic gold standard for microbiome
prep: Raw in salads. The slight bitter is the point.

mech: Lower fat than beef (7g vs 15g). Higher iron + B12
ev: Leaner red-meat option. Traditional staple
prep: Slow-cook in pepper soup or stew. Dishes: Asun, Goat pepper soup

mech: Complete amino acid profile (rare for legume). RS when cooled
ev: Drought-resistant complete protein
prep: Soak overnight, boil. Cool. Dishes: Okpa, Boiled snack

mech: Defatted groundnut: high protein per calorie
ev: Roasting reduces aflatoxin risk. Caution on portion
prep: Snack or crumble on salad. 30g max. Dishes: Kulikuli

mech: Iron 2.3mg + Calcium 215mg/100g. Highest-Ca leaf in protocol
ev: Mineral-dense at 23 kcal
prep: Stir-fry or in efo riro. Dishes: Efo tete, Tete elegusi

mech: Highest protein leaf in Africa (7g/100g). Vitamin A + C
ev: Pounded preparation neutralises cyanogens
prep: MUST be pounded + boiled 30min+. Dishes: Saka saka, Pondu

mech: Higher polyphenols than the root + lutein for retina
ev: Polyphenol density well-characterised
prep: Stir-fry or in soup. Dishes: Sweet potato leaf soup

mech: Same Nrf2/AMPK as powder + chlorophyll + complete protein
ev: RCT: improved fasting glucose and insulin
prep: Wilt into eggs or stews. Dishes: Aluyahu sauce

mech: Diterpenes + xylopic acid AMPK + lipase inhibition
ev: In-vitro α-glucosidase + lipid effects
prep: In pepper soup or post-natal tonics. Dishes: Pepper soup

mech: Myristicin + monoterpenes anti-inflammatory + thermogenic
ev: Animal model thermogenic effect
prep: Roast + grind. Dishes: Nsala soup, Pepper soup

mech: Capsaicin TRPV1 UCP1 + 12mg vitamin C + carotenoids
ev: Same capsaicin RCT pathway as cayenne
prep: Daily in stews and soups. Dishes: Efo riro, Suya pepper

mech: Lowest GI grain (40). Calcium 180mg/100g — only grain with significant Ca
ev: Ethiopian cohort: low T2D incidence in injera-staple regions
prep: Cook + cool. Carb days only. Dishes: Injera (cooled)

mech: RS 4–5g. Tannins inhibit α-amylase. Naturally gluten-free
ev: Low GI grain — better profile than rice or wheat
prep: Cook + cool. Carb days. Dishes: Tuwo masara, Sorghum porridge

mech: Complete-protein legume + RS. Magnesium dense
ev: Igbo cohort: traditional satiety food
prep: Soak, boil to softness. Dishes: Ukwa porridge

mech: Casein + sorrel-leaf coagulant. Fresh = no aged-mould risk
ev: Casein satiety pathway
prep: Pan-fry + pepper. Dishes: Wara peppered

mech: Fermented millet + ginger. Lactobacillus + gingerol
ev: Fermentation reduces phytate. Carb-aware portion
prep: Unsweetened only. Carb days. Dishes: Kunu zaki

mech: Highest protein:calorie ratio in common muscle meat. Leucine load (~2.9g/serve) drives MPS during a deficit.
ev: RCT evidence: high-protein lean-meat diets preserve lean mass and improve satiety in calorie deficits.
prep: Poach or bake 180°C. Avoid breading and deep-frying.

mech: Grass-fed has modestly higher omega-3 and CLA. Heme iron is highly bioavailable for menstruating women.
ev: Cohort: lean unprocessed red meat is neutral for VAT when replacing refined carbs (isocaloric).
prep: Sear hot + rest 5 min. Pair with cruciferous side.

mech: Leaner than beef (about 30% less fat at same cut) with higher B12 and zinc per calorie.
ev: Composition data; no direct body-comp RCT vs beef.
prep: Grill medium-rare. Do not overcook — very lean.

mech: Ultra-lean game meat with high iron and B12 for the calorie load.
ev: Composition: typically <7% fat. Cohort evidence on game meat limited.
prep: Slow-roast or stew to keep moisture. Rest 10 min.

mech: Leanest pork cut — protein:kcal close to chicken breast. Thiamine-dense.
ev: RCTs of lean pork in calorie deficit match chicken for body-comp outcomes.
prep: Trim silverskin. Sear then 160°C oven.

mech: Very lean shellfish. Astaxanthin (shell residue) supports antioxidant capacity.
ev: Cohort: seafood intake inversely associated with cardiometabolic disease.
prep: Steam or grill. Keep tails for astaxanthin.

mech: Lowest-kcal shellfish per gram protein. B12-dense.
ev: Composition data; part of broader seafood cohort evidence.
prep: Sear very hot + briefly. Do not overcook.

mech: Ultra-lean white fish — high selenium and iodine, low mercury.
ev: Meta-analyses: white-fish intake inversely associated with metabolic syndrome.
prep: Bake or poach. Finish with lemon.

mech: Freshwater oily fish with omega-3 similar to farmed salmon but lower mercury.
ev: Oily-fish meta-analysis: reduces trunk fat modestly.
prep: Bake skin-on 180°C for 12 min.

mech: Among the highest omega-3 per gram of common fish (~3g EPA+DHA/100g). Sustainable.
ev: PREDIMED-aligned: oily-fish intake inversely associated with VAT.
prep: Pickled (skip added sugar) or smoked. Swap for sardines.

mech: High-protein cephalopod with dense taurine — supports bile flow and lipid handling.
ev: Composition data; taurine RCTs support metabolic markers.
prep: Pressure-cook 20 min then grill briefly.

mech: Highest zinc per calorie of any food (~40mg/100g). Zinc is a co-factor for the insulin receptor.
ev: Composition + cohort: zinc sufficiency correlates with insulin sensitivity.
prep: Raw on ice or grilled. Lemon + mignonette.

mech: Skinless duck breast is as lean as chicken with more iron.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Remove skin before cooking. Pan-sear 4 min each side.

mech: Complete plant protein with isoflavones. Low energy density when water-rich.
ev: Meta-analyses: soy intake inversely associated with central adiposity in postmenopausal cohorts.
prep: Press 20 min + marinate. Pan-fry in EVOO.

mech: Wheat-gluten: highest-protein plant option, near-zero fat. Not for coeliac/NCGS.
ev: Composition data; no direct body-comp RCT.
prep: Simmer in stock. Avoid if wheat-sensitive.

mech: Savoury protein topping; B12-fortified varieties close a common plant-diet gap. Contains beta-glucan.
ev: Composition; beta-glucan meta-evidence at higher doses.
prep: Sprinkle on veg and soups. Pick B12-fortified.

mech: Sheep/goat cheese — shorter-chain fats than cow cheese. Portion it as a flavour accent.
ev: Cohort: Mediterranean dairy pattern neutral on VAT when portioned.
prep: 40g measured. Crumble on salad.

mech: High-protein grilling cheese. Calorie-dense — treat as protein + fat together.
ev: Composition data. Portion sensitive.
prep: Dry-fry 1 min each side. Lemon + mint.

mech: Cruciferous with anthocyanins: glucosinolates + cyanidin-3-glucoside double mechanism.
ev: Cohort: cruciferous + anthocyanin-rich veg inversely associated with VAT.
prep: Shred raw for slaw. Ferment for kraut.

mech: Baby cruciferous — fast-cook glucosinolate source with high vitamin C.
ev: Cruciferous cohort evidence on CMD.
prep: Stir-fry 90 sec. Keep crunchy.

mech: High nitrates + magnesium. Betalain pigments support Nrf2.
ev: Nitrate-BP meta-analysis applies.
prep: Wilt in EVOO + garlic.

mech: Cruciferous with highest calcium of the leaves (~230mg/100g). Binds bile acids.
ev: In-vitro + small human: collards bind bile acids comparable to cholestyramine.
prep: Steam 6 min or raw as wraps.

mech: Peppery cruciferous: glucosinolates + nitrate.
ev: Composition; cruciferous cohort applies.
prep: Raw salad or wilted on pizza.

mech: Low energy density with soluble pectin.
ev: Cohort: legume-family intake inversely associated with waist circumference.
prep: Steam 4 min. Dress with EVOO + lemon.

mech: Crunchy pod: pectin plus modest resistant starch.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Raw snack or 90-sec blanch.

mech: Cruciferous stem — glucosinolates + 62mg vitamin C/100g.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Peel + raw sticks with dip.

mech: Allium family: inulin prebiotic + allicin-related sulphides.
ev: Cohort: allium intake inversely associated with CMD.
prep: Slice thin + slow-sweat in EVOO.

mech: Anethole + fibre. Digestive and mildly antispasmodic.
ev: Small trials on IBS symptoms; body-comp evidence limited.
prep: Shave raw or roast with orange zest.

mech: Cruciferous crunch — glucosinolates with near-zero kcal.
ev: Composition; cruciferous cohort applies.
prep: Slice raw. Ferment for kimchi.

mech: Cruciferous root — glucosinolates + potassium.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Cube + roast with rosemary.

mech: Sweet root with soluble fibre. Carb-day root alternative to sweet potato.
ev: Composition; GI ~52 cooked.
prep: Roast + cool for RS. Carb days.

mech: Beta-carotene + soluble fibre. GI 44 when boiled then cooled.
ev: Cohort: carotenoid-rich veg inversely associated with VAT.
prep: Cube, boil + cool. Carb days.

mech: RS3 when cooled. GI 29. Phaseolamin blocks α-amylase when raw.
ev: Meta: legume intake reduced weight and waist 0.5–2cm over 6+ weeks.
prep: Soak 8h + boil 90 min. Never eat raw.

mech: Highest fibre legume (~25% DW). RS when cooled.
ev: Legume meta evidence applies.
prep: Soak + cook + cool. Carb days.

mech: Fast-cooking legume with soluble fibre and RS when cooled.
ev: Legume meta evidence applies.
prep: Simmer 40 min. Dal-style with spices.

mech: Highest fibre berry (~6.5g/100g). Anthocyanins + ellagitannins.
ev: Cohort: berry intake inversely associated with waist circumference.
prep: Frozen is fine. Add to yoghurt or skyr.

mech: Anthocyanins + urolithin precursors (mitochondrial health pathway).
ev: Cohort + small RCTs on endothelial function.
prep: Frozen or fresh. Skyr + chia base.

mech: Actinidin enzyme aids protein digestion. Soluble fibre + vitamin C.
ev: RCT: 2 kiwi/day improved constipation and satiety.
prep: Skin-on for extra fibre (edible).

mech: Pectin + stone-cell fibre. Skin-on keeps polyphenols.
ev: Cohort: apple and pear intake inversely associated with T2D risk.
prep: Skin-on pre-meal for satiety.

mech: Flavanones (hesperidin) + pectin + vitamin C — whole fruit only, not juice.
ev: RCT: hesperidin improved endothelial function.
prep: Whole fruit. Avoid juice.

mech: Gluten-free pseudo-cereal. Rutin + d-chiro-inositol support insulin sensitivity.
ev: RCT: buckwheat lowered fasting glucose vs wheat control.
prep: Cook + cool. Carb days.

mech: Sourdough fermentation lowers GI; rye adds arabinoxylan fibre.
ev: RCT: sourdough rye produced lower post-meal glucose vs white bread.
prep: Whole-rye sourdough only. Carb days.

mech: Ancient wheat with beta-glucan and ferulic acid. GI ~40 when pearled.
ev: Composition + small trials on satiety.
prep: Cook + cool. Carb days.

mech: Galactomannan fibre slows glucose absorption. 4-hydroxy-isoleucine supports insulin response.
ev: Meta of 10 RCTs: reduced fasting glucose, HbA1c and LDL.
prep: Soak overnight; toast and grind, or sprout.

mech: Thymoquinone: anti-inflammatory and AMPK activation.
ev: Meta-analysis: reduced weight, BMI and waist at 1–3 g/day.
prep: Crack or grind. Daily in tea or on salad.

mech: Cineole + terpinene. Small effects on triglycerides and CRP.
ev: Small RCTs: lipid and inflammation improvements at 3g/d.
prep: Grind pods fresh. In coffee or stews.

mech: Higher EGCG concentration than loose-leaf green tea (whole leaf powder).
ev: Green-tea catechin meta-analysis: ~5.6 cm² visceral fat reduction/12wk.
prep: Whisk with 70°C water. No sugar.

mech: Theaflavins + catechins — partial oxidation gives distinct polyphenol profile.
ev: RCTs: oolong reduced body fat modestly over 6 weeks.
prep: 85°C, 3 min steep. Between meals.

mech: Xanthines + saponins. Small effects on fat oxidation and appetite.
ev: RCT: 3g/day reduced waist ~2 cm over 12 weeks.
prep: 70°C water. Traditional gourd + bombilla.

mech: Thymol + cuminaldehyde. Anti-hyperglycaemic signalling in small trials.
ev: RCT: 3g/day cumin reduced weight and waist in overweight women.
prep: Toast + grind. In stews and rubs.

mech: Linalool + cineole. Mild glucose-lowering in animal models.
ev: In-vitro α-glucosidase; human RCTs limited.
prep: Toast + crush. In curries and pickles.

mech: Carnosic acid + rosmarinic acid modulate lipid-mediated inflammation.
ev: Small RCT: rosemary extract reduced fasting glucose.
prep: Whole sprigs with roasted veg.

mech: Thymol + carvacrol. Anti-microbial and anti-inflammatory terpenes.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Strip leaves. With slow-cook proteins.

mech: Salvia officinalis: rosmarinic acid + thujone (moderate use). Glucose and memory support.
ev: Small RCTs: reduced fasting glucose at 500–1000mg extract.
prep: Fresh leaves. With butter + butternut.

mech: Highest polyphenol density of culinary herbs. Carvacrol + rosmarinic acid.
ev: Composition + in-vitro AMPK activation.
prep: Daily on tomato dishes.

mech: Allyl isothiocyanate: Nrf2 activation + pungent satiety.
ev: Composition; small trials on respiratory outcomes.
prep: Fresh-grated. Pairs with lean red meat.

mech: True Wasabia japonica: allyl isothiocyanate + distinct 6-MSITC. Most tubes are dyed horseradish.
ev: Composition data; check ingredient list for true wasabi.
prep: Fresh-grated. Tiny dab with sashimi.

mech: MUFA + gamma-tocopherol + magnesium. Highest antioxidant among common tree nuts.
ev: RCT: pecan-enriched diet improved lipid profile at ~42g/d.
prep: Raw. 28g measured.

mech: MUFA (~50% oleic) + proanthocyanidins + vitamin E.
ev: Cohort: hazelnut intake inversely associated with CMD.
prep: Raw, skin-on for polyphenols.

mech: MUFA + magnesium + copper. Slightly higher carb than other tree nuts.
ev: PREDIMED-aligned nut cohort.
prep: Raw only. 28g measured.

mech: Vitamin E dense (35% DV). PUFA-rich — balance with omega-3 sources.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Raw or lightly toasted. 28g measured.

mech: Sesamin + sesamolin lignans. Calcium 195mg per 20g.
ev: RCT: sesame lignans improved lipid profile.
prep: Toast lightly. Sprinkle on veg.

mech: Oleic acid + β-sitosterol. Highest smoke point MUFA oil (~270°C).
ev: RCTs: avocado oil improved lipid profile vs butter.
prep: High-heat searing or dressings.

mech: Butyrate + modest CLA. Lactose/casein-free — tolerated by dairy-sensitive.
ev: Composition; butter-fat RCTs mixed. Keep portion small.
prep: 1 tsp for flavour. Not a primary fat.

mech: Flavanols (epicatechin + catechin) + magnesium + theobromine. No added sugar.
ev: RCTs: cocoa flavanols improved insulin sensitivity.
prep: Sprinkle on yoghurt or porridge.

mech: Pinolenic acid: CCK-mediated satiety effect.
ev: Small RCT: pine-nut oil reduced appetite.
prep: Raw. 20g — very calorie dense.

mech: ALA omega-3 (~57%). Conversion to EPA/DHA limited — complement with fish.
ev: RCT: ALA improved lipid profile.
prep: Cold only. Never heat. Refrigerate.

mech: MUFA + magnesium. Check label: first ingredient almonds, no added oils.
ev: Nut cohort + PREDIMED.
prep: 1 tbsp measured. With apple slices.

mech: Legume, not a true nut. Oleic acid + modest resveratrol.
ev: Cohort: natural PB neutral to slightly beneficial vs refined snacks.
prep: Oil-on-top kind. No palm oil, no sugar.

mech: Higher CLA and K2 vs grain-fed. Calorie-dense — flavour accent, not primary fat.
ev: Composition; saturated-fat evidence context-dependent.
prep: 1 tsp measured. Never replaces EVOO.

mech: Ultra-low energy density. Folate and modest vitamin A.
ev: Volumetrics evidence: high-water leaves reduce total intake.
prep: Raw salads + wraps.

mech: Highest-water lettuce. Crunch without calories.
ev: Volumetrics; lower nutrient density than coloured greens.
prep: Shred for texture. Not your primary leaf.

mech: Soft leaf — great bread alternative for wraps.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Raw. Swap for tortillas.

mech: Inulin prebiotic + crunch. Low GI (~17).
ev: Composition + inulin prebiotic evidence.
prep: Raw sticks with lime + chili.

mech: Cruciferous + myrosinase enzyme. High water, low kcal.
ev: Composition; cruciferous cohort applies.
prep: Grate raw or ferment (takuan).

mech: Vitamin D (UV-exposed) + ergothioneine antioxidant. Satiety with low kcal.
ev: RCT: mushrooms as meat-swap reduced weight over 12wk.
prep: Dry-sauté then add fat.

mech: Meat-texture swap. Ergothioneine + β-glucan.
ev: Mushroom meat-swap RCT.
prep: Roast whole as burger-bun alternative.

mech: β-glucan + lovastatin precursors. Modest LDL effects.
ev: Small trials on lipid markers.
prep: Tear + sear hot.

mech: Baby portobello — same ergothioneine.
ev: Mushroom cohort evidence.
prep: Dry-sauté first.

mech: High-fibre thin mushroom. Distinct texture for soups.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Add last 60 sec to broth.

mech: Beta-glucan (D-fraction) with immunomodulatory data.
ev: Small RCTs: improved insulin sensitivity in diabetics.
prep: Tear + pan-roast.

mech: Nasunin (skin) + soluble fibre. Absorbs oil — portion fat carefully.
ev: Small trials on LDL reduction.
prep: Salt + drain 20 min. Roast whole.

mech: Pasta-volume swap. Low-GI winter squash.
ev: Volumetrics evidence.
prep: Halve + roast cut-side down 40 min.

mech: Beta-carotene + soluble fibre. Low-kcal thickener for stews and smoothies.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Plain, unsweetened. Check label.

mech: Near-identical to zucchini — different cultivar. Lutein + potassium.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Grill or slice raw.

mech: Iodine + B12-like compounds (bioavailability debated). Iron + fibre.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Wrap or crumble on rice and fish.

mech: Fucoxanthin (UCP1 activation) + soluble fibre.
ev: RCTs: fucoxanthin supplements reduced body fat modestly.
prep: Rehydrate 5 min. Miso soup.

mech: North-Atlantic seaweed. Protein-rich for seaweed (~25% DW). Umami flavour.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Toast + crumble on eggs.

mech: Fermented soybean — Aspergillus + Lactobacillus. Isoflavones and bioactive peptides.
ev: Cohort: miso intake inversely associated with gastric and metabolic risk.
prep: Dissolve in 70°C water, not boiling.

mech: Bacillus subtilis + nattokinase + K2 (MK-7). Distinct fermented soy format.
ev: RCTs: nattokinase reduced blood pressure; K2 supports vascular calcification prevention.
prep: Stir 30 sec before eating. Over brown rice.

mech: Lacto-fermented if naturally brined. Probiotic only if not vinegar-pickled.
ev: Fermented-veg cohort evidence.
prep: Refrigerated and unpasteurised only.

mech: Low-kcal crunchy brine. Most commercial are vinegar — probiotic value only if fermented.
ev: Composition data.
prep: With charcuterie in small portion.

mech: Gingerol + brine. Clears the palate between rich courses.
ev: Ginger meta-analysis applies.
prep: Between protein courses.

mech: High-nitrate leaves (beet top). Do not bin them.
ev: Nitrate-NO-BP evidence.
prep: Wilt with chard + garlic.

mech: Bitter greens stimulate bile. Inulin + luteolin + K1.
ev: Traditional use; small trials on liver enzymes.
prep: Blanch briefly to reduce bitterness.

mech: Phycocyanin + complete amino acid profile + iron.
ev: Meta-analysis: reduced body weight and waist modestly.
prep: Mix into water + lemon. Acquired taste.

mech: CGF (Chlorella Growth Factor) + chlorophyll. B12 analogues unreliable.
ev: Small RCTs: body-comp effects modest.
prep: With water. Do not rely on for B12.

mech: Limonene + citric acid + vitamin C. Zero-cost flavour that extends satiety.
ev: Composition; acid + fat synergy on satiety.
prep: Use zest and juice.

mech: Citric acid supports bile and modest glucose modulation.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Zest + juice with avocado and fish.

mech: Apigenin flavonoid + vitamin K1 + vitamin C. Chew raw for oral health.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Chop + add at end of cooking.

mech: Anti-inflammatory linalool + vitamin K. Chelation claims overstated.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Raw over curries and ceviche.

mech: Eugenol + rosmarinic acid. Lower oxalate than many herbs.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Tear at end of cooking. Pesto in portion.

mech: Monoterpenes + vitamin C. Classic fish pairing.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Raw over fish, yoghurt and cucumber.

mech: Live-culture fermented tea. Pick brands with <2g sugar/100ml.
ev: Small trials on glycaemia; largely mechanistic.
prep: Low-sugar brands only. 250ml/day max.

mech: Heat + EVOO multiplies lycopene bioavailability. Stew base.
ev: PREDIMED-aligned.
prep: Slow-cook with EVOO.

mech: Sun-dried spiced beef (Hausa). High protein:kcal with yaji spice blend.
ev: Composition data. Traditional portable protein.
prep: 30g max — sodium-dense. Dishes: Kilishi

mech: Omega-3 preserved by cold-smoke. Staple for West African stews.
ev: Oily-fish meta-analysis applies.
prep: Soak 15 min to desalt. Dishes: Okro soup, Efo riro

mech: Smoked small pelagic (Ethmalosa). Omega-3 retained, affordable staple.
ev: Composition + oily-fish cohort evidence.
prep: Soak to soften. Dishes: Banga soup, Egusi

mech: Herring omega-3 preserved via cold-smoke.
ev: Herring omega-3 evidence applies.
prep: Soak + debone. Dishes: Ogbono, Efo riro

mech: Concentrated umami with astaxanthin. Zinc + selenium dense.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Grind into soups. Dishes: Edikang ikong, Okra soup

mech: Lean freshwater protein from Lake Victoria. Sustainability caveat — export-dominant fishery.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Grill or steam. Dishes: Whole fried, Pepper soup

mech: Most nutrient-dense food in the protocol: B12, retinol, folate, iron, copper.
ev: Cohort + RCT: liver intake corrects anaemia and raises retinol.
prep: Pan-fry 90 sec each side. Dishes: Asun liver, Suya liver

mech: Ultra-lean offal protein. Traditional suya cut.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Boil + grill. Dishes: Asun gizzard, Gizdodo

mech: Steamed black-eyed-pea pudding. Plant protein + RS when cooled + fibre.
ev: Legume meta applies. GI ~30.
prep: Steam in leaves or ramekins. Dishes: Moin-moin

mech: Ultra-lean offal with selenium and B12.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Soak in milk or acid + sauté hot. Dishes: Isi ewu, Offal stew

mech: Whole-fish eaten with bones = calcium. Staple Lake Victoria protein.
ev: Composition + whole-fish calcium retention.
prep: Dry-fry + tomato-onion stew. Dishes: Omena stew

mech: Lean protein with preserved smoke aroma. Lower omega-3 than oily fish.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Flake into soups. Dishes: Smoked tilapia pepper soup

mech: Fermented oil-bean seed (Pentaclethra macrophylla). Wild Bacillus + bioactive peptides.
ev: Composition; fermentation microbiology confirmed.
prep: Rinse + shred. Dishes: Ugba abacha, Isi ewu

mech: Fermented castor-seed paste. Bacillus + yeast cultures. Traditional umami.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Pea-sized amount in soups. Dishes: Ogbono, Egusi

mech: Fermented millet porridge with ginger and cloves. Lactobacillus-dominant.
ev: Fermentation microbiology; carb-day only.
prep: Thin. Pair with kosai protein. Carb days. Dishes: Hausa koko

mech: Fermented maize dumpling (Ga/Fante). Lactic fermentation reduces phytate.
ev: Fermentation microbiology. High-GI — carb day only.
prep: Small portion with fish. Dishes: Kenkey + okro + fish

mech: Fermented maize + cassava porridge. Lactobacillus-dominant.
ev: Fermentation microbiology.
prep: Portion-aware. Carb days. Dishes: Banku + tilapia + pepper sauce

mech: Fermented teff flatbread. Lactic fermentation + naturally gluten-free teff.
ev: Composition + low-GI teff base.
prep: Use as plate + utensil. Carb day. Dishes: Injera + wat

mech: Fermented yam-flour porridge. High-GI — portion is critical.
ev: Fermentation microbiology; carb day only.
prep: Thin portion with fibre + protein. Dishes: Amala + ewedu + gbegiri

mech: Fermented cassava granules (Manihot). Fermentation lowers cyanogens.
ev: Fermentation microbiology.
prep: Soak cold only — no swallow-eba. Carb days. Dishes: Gari soakings

mech: Fermented maize drink. L. plantarum-dominant. Unsweetened traditional form.
ev: Fermentation microbiology.
prep: Unsweetened only. Dishes: Mahewu, Amahewu

mech: Fermented cow milk — Fulani/Ghanaian tradition. Casein + Lactobacillus.
ev: Casein + fermented dairy evidence.
prep: Unsweetened. Swap for yoghurt. Dishes: Fura da nunu

mech: Fermented sorghum or millet stiff porridge. Lactic fermentation reduces phytate.
ev: Fermentation microbiology. High-GI — carb day only.
prep: Small portion + protein side. Dishes: Tö + sauce gombo

mech: Fermented pearl-millet dumpling (Hausa). Lactobacillus + yeast.
ev: Fermentation microbiology.
prep: Mash into nono drink. Carb days. Dishes: Fura da nono

mech: Charantin + momordicin + polypeptide-p: insulin-mimetic in animal + clinical data.
ev: Meta of small RCTs: modest reductions in fasting glucose and HbA1c.
prep: Brief blanch to soften bitterness. Dishes: Ejiri stew, Bitter melon soup

mech: West African black pepper: piperine + guineensine. Enhances curcumin uptake.
ev: Piperine + TRPV1 evidence (extrapolated).
prep: Toast + grind. Dishes: Nsala, Pepper soup

mech: Gongronema latifolium: saponins + flavonoids. Anti-hyperglycaemic in animal studies.
ev: Animal models; small clinical trials preliminary.
prep: Slivered raw on ukwa or pepper soup. Dishes: Isi ewu, Nkwobi

mech: Tetrapleura tetraptera: scaretin + aridanin. Small trials on lipid and glucose markers.
ev: In-vivo animal + small human trials on glycaemia.
prep: Roast + add to soups. Dishes: Nsala, Pepper soup, Prekese tea

mech: Capsaicin (higher Scoville than scotch bonnet). TRPV1 → UCP1 + satiety.
ev: Capsaicin meta-analysis applies.
prep: Small amount daily. Dishes: Efo riro, Stew

mech: Chili-infused oil base (often peanut or sunflower). Capsaicin + MUFA/PUFA.
ev: Capsaicin meta applies — check base-oil quality.
prep: On grilled meats. Dishes: Nyama choma, Chapati

mech: Ethiopian blend: cayenne + fenugreek + ginger + cloves + ajwain. Multi-mechanism.
ev: Individual components have RCT evidence; blend inferred.
prep: Rub on proteins. Dishes: Doro wat, Misir wat

mech: North African ~30-spice blend: cumin + coriander + cinnamon + cardamom + ginger.
ev: Component-based inference; no direct RCT for blend.
prep: Toast + rub. Dishes: Tagine, Couscous

mech: Hazelnut + sesame + cumin + coriander. Nut polyphenols meet spice thermogenesis.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Dip crudités in EVOO + dukkah. Dishes: Dukkah + crudité

mech: Fermented chili paste (cayenne + garlic + cumin + caraway + EVOO).
ev: Capsaicin + fermented-veg cohort evidence.
prep: Stir into stews. Dishes: Shakshuka, Grilled fish

mech: Dioscorea rotundata: RS when cooked + cooled. GI ~37 boiled+cooled vs 65 pounded hot.
ev: Composition + resistant-starch evidence.
prep: Boil + cool 30 min. Carb days. Dishes: Boiled yam, Yam porridge (cooled)

mech: Dioscorea alata: higher mucilage than white yam. Diosgenin + RS when cooled.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Boil + cool. Carb days. Dishes: Pounded yam alt, Asaro

mech: Fast-cooking legume with complete amino acids. RS when cooled.
ev: Legume meta-analysis applies.
prep: Cook + cool. Dishes: Pigeon-pea curry, Rice + pigeon peas

mech: Drought-tolerant grain with magnesium + iron. GI 54–59.
ev: Anitha 2021 millet meta: reduced HbA1c vs refined grains.
prep: Cook + cool. Dishes: Tuwon dawa, Bajra roti

mech: Highest calcium grain (~344mg/100g). GI 54. Seed-coat polyphenols.
ev: Small RCTs: ragi lower post-meal glucose vs rice or wheat.
prep: Cook + cool. Dishes: Finger-millet porridge

mech: Pseudo-cereal with complete protein + squalene. Gluten-free.
ev: Small trials on lipid profile.
prep: Cook + cool. Dishes: Amaranth porridge

mech: Ancestor of black-eyed pea. RS when cooled. GI 33.
ev: Legume meta applies; cowpea cohort from W.Africa.
prep: Soak + cook + cool. Dishes: Ewa riro, Red beans stew

mech: Unpolished African red rice. Lower GI than white (~55 cooled).
ev: Composition + cooled-rice RS evidence.
prep: Cook + cool overnight. Carb days. Dishes: Ofada + ayamase

mech: Spondias-family fruit: pectin + polyphenols + vitamin C.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Raw when ripe. Dishes: Iyeye snack

mech: Dried green-plantain powder — among the highest-RS dietary staples (~30g RS/100g).
ev: Composition + RS evidence.
prep: Mix into yoghurt or porridge. Carb days. Dishes: Plantain fufu

mech: Starchy seed (often discarded). RS3 when cooked + cooled. Lectins destroyed by cooking.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Boil 15 min + peel. Cool. Dishes: Boiled jackfruit seeds

mech: Green seed pod — distinct from leaves or powder. Oleic + fibre + isothiocyanates.
ev: Composition + broader moringa evidence.
prep: Steam + scrape flesh. Dishes: Drumstick curry

mech: Tartaric + malic acids + xyloglucan. α-amylase inhibitor in animal studies.
ev: Small trials: reduced BMI + lipid markers.
prep: Soak + strain. Dishes: Tamarind chutney, Sour soup

mech: Plectranthus esculentus: drought-resilient tuber. RS when cooled.
ev: Composition; clinical evidence limited.
prep: Boil + cool. Carb days. Dishes: Boiled Hausa potato

mech: Ocimum gratissimum: eugenol + linalool. Distinct African basil with mild anti-hyperglycaemic action.
ev: Small animal + clinical trials on glucose.
prep: Raw at end of cook. Dishes: Nsala soup, Pepper soup

mech: Pterocarpus soyauxii: polyphenols + vitamin A. Traditional Igbo staple.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Add at end of cook. Dishes: Oha soup, Ofe oha

mech: Lagos spinach (Celosia argentea). High iron + folate for a Nigerian leaf.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Stir-fry or stew. Dishes: Efo riro shoko

mech: Jew's mallow: glucomannan-like mucilage + iron + calcium + carotenoids.
ev: Composition + mucilage-glucose evidence.
prep: Chop fine + simmer 3 min. Dishes: Molokhia soup

mech: Taro / cocoyam leaves. Oxalate-high before cooking. Iron + fibre + carotenoids once cooked.
ev: Composition; cooking reduces oxalate.
prep: Simmer 15 min. Dishes: Palaver sauce, Abomu

mech: Mixed indigenous greens (spider plant, amaranth, pigweed). High protein and micronutrient density.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Stew + groundnut + tomato. Dishes: Morogo wa dinawa

mech: Dried baobab-leaf powder for soups. Mucilage + calcium + iron.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Simmer into sauce. Dishes: Kuka soup, Lalo

mech: Crassocephalum crepidioides: Yoruba rainforest leaf. Iron + vitamin A + quercetin.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Wilt into stew. Dishes: Efo ebolo, Mixed efo

mech: Distinct from uziza seeds. Piperine traces + eugenol. Pungent aromatic.
ev: Composition + piperine inference.
prep: Torn into pepper soup. Dishes: Nsala, Pepper soup

mech: Senecio biafrae: bitter-leaf-family staple with iron and vitamin A.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Wilt into soup. Dishes: Bologi soup

mech: Gnetum africanum: slice-dense leaf with fibre + iron. Traditional satiety leaf.
ev: Composition data.
prep: Slice fine + slow-simmer. Dishes: Afang soup, Ukazi

mech: Cola nitida: caffeine + theobromine + kolanin. Traditional appetite suppressant — caution with caffeine load.
ev: Animal studies + cohort evidence for metabolic and CV effects. Human VAT RCTs limited.
prep: Chew tiny amount. Max 1 nut/day. Dishes: Kola nut snack

mech: Distinct from leaf or powder: niazimicin + oleic-rich oil. BP and glucose effects in small RCTs.
ev: Small RCTs on glucose + BP in T2D cohorts.
prep: Remove seed coat + chew, or press for Ben oil. Dishes: Moringa-seed snack

mech: Thymoquinone: anti-inflammatory and insulin-sensitising.
ev: Meta-analysis: reduced weight, BMI, waist, fasting glucose and HbA1c.
prep: 1 tsp on salad or yoghurt. Dishes: Habba sauda tonic

mech: Whole dried pulp — distinct from sieved powder. 50% fibre (soluble + insoluble) + 6× orange vitamin C + polyphenols.
ev: Coe 2013 RCT: reduced glycaemic response 20–25%. Cohort: lower CMD markers in consuming populations.
prep: Crack pod + dissolve + strain. Dishes: Bouye, Baobab juice (unsweetened)
